API Reference¶

fivedreg Package¶

class fivedreg.data.DataHandler(filepath: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

get_scaler()[source]¶
load_dataset(filepath: str) → Tuple[ndarray, ndarray][source]¶

Loads X and y from a .pkl or .npz file.

preprocess_and_split(test_size: float = 0.2, val_size: float = 0.2, random_state: int = 42)[source]¶

Standardizes data and splits into train/val/test.

class fivedreg.model.ModelHandler(hidden_layers: List[int] = [64, 32, 16], learning_rate: float = 0.001, max_epochs: int = 100)[source]¶

Bases: object

fit(X: ndarray, y: ndarray, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Trains the model using Scikit-Learn MLPRegressor.

predict(X: ndarray) → ndarray[source]¶

Predicts using the trained model.
